description: Rise of Avalon Patch 9 (16 November 2020) — Corrupted Dungeon Mob Changes, Other Changes, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Corrupted Dungeon Mob Changes
items: Decreased the damage dealt by Forceful Swing and Reckless Swing
Slightly reduced the damage dealt by Furious Outburst
Infernal Horror: Adjusted spell area to better match visual effects
Demonic Warlock (Hunter Difficulty): Slightly reduced damage dealt
sections.searchable_text: Corrupted Dungeon Mob Changes Demonic Harbinger Forceful Swing Reckless Swing Furious Outburst Infernal Chains Bewildered Heretic Brawler Rip and Tear Groundsmash Infernal Horror Hellhound Demonic Warlock

sections.heading: Other Changes
items: Added a new Marketplace subcategory for Battle Mounts
Satchels of Insight on the Black Market are now closer to their previous value, and their prices will increase more quickly
Adjusted behavior of Pathfinder Great Mage (Roads of Avalon boss) to better fit the terrain
Enchanted Stone added to Adventurer's Challenge weekly chests, bringing stone in line with other resources in these chests
Updated item icons: Sacred Bone Marrow and Carved Skull Padding to be easier to differentiate
sections.searchable_text: Other Changes Marketplace Battle Mounts Satchels of Insight Black Market Pathfinder Great Mage Enchanted Stone Adventurers Challenge Sacred Bone Marrow Carved Skull Padding

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Frost Staffs Holy Staffs Armor Helmets Shoes Miscellaneous AoE Escalation

subsections.heading: Frost Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Frost Staffs Frozen Hell Icicle Staff Slow Strength

subsections.heading: Holy Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Holy Staffs Divine Intervention Hallowfall Cooldown Sacred Pulse Heal Value

changes.raw_text: Divine Intervention (Hallowfall): Cooldown: 18s → 25s If you heal at least one ally, the cooldown of the ability decreases by 40%
notes: If you heal at least one ally, the cooldown of the ability decreases by 40%

changes.raw_text: Sacred Pulse (all Holy Staffs): Cooldown: 8s → 12s Heal Value: 56 → 40

subsections.heading: Armor
subsections.searchable_text: Armor Self Ignition Spectre Jacket True Damage vs Players

changes.raw_text: Self Ignition (Spectre Jacket): True Damage vs Players: 50 → 45

subsections.heading: Helmets
subsections.searchable_text: Helmets Force Field cloth helmets knockback

changes.raw_text: Force Field (all cloth helmets): Knockback no longer scales with IP Instead, the ability now always knocks targets 14m away (ignoring crowd control resistance)
notes: Knockback no longer scales with IP
Ability now always knocks targets 14m away (ignoring crowd control resistance)

subsections.heading: Shoes
subsections.searchable_text: Shoes Motivating Pain Quarrier Workboots Cooldown

changes.raw_text: AoE Escalation: 2 Targets = 8% → 5% 3 Targets = 16% → 10% 4 Targets = 24% → 15% 5 Targets = 32% → 20% 6 Targets = 40% → 25% 7 Targets = 40% → 30% 8 Targets = 40% → 35% 9+ Targets: remains at 40%

sections.heading: Fixes
items: All tiers of Snapper now give the correct Fame when eaten raw and can be made into Chopped Fish as intended
Fixed missing minimap information showing water and ability to fish in Caerleon Underway
Various dungeon and open-world terrain fixes
Additional minor graphical, animation, and localization fixes
